mechanism: Care is reduced to brief empathic feeling
possible_dampener: Distinguish empathic activation from sustained caring response

mechanism: Care language centers feeling rather than recipient need
possible_dampener: Use responsiveness dignity agency and follow-through checks

mechanism: Chronic care burden weakens sustained response
possible_dampener: Provide rest staffing shared responsibility and institutional support

mechanism: Concern favors the familiar visible or proximate
possible_dampener: Widen concern through testimony contact justice norms and structural visibility

mechanism: Helping overrides recipient agency or dignity
possible_dampener: Use consent voice participatory decision-making and respect

mechanism: Care labor is expected but unrecognized
possible_dampener: Recognize compensate and distribute care labor fairly

mechanism: Organizations praise care while denying conditions for care
possible_dampener: Align metrics staffing incentives and resources with humane care

mechanism: Care failures cannot be safely named
possible_dampener: Protect reporting dissent correction and affected-person testimony

mechanism: Harm in care relationships is minimized or personalized
possible_dampener: Use apology restitution system redesign and learning loops
